{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Inventory Control Analyst",
  "description": "Kimeric Nigeria Limited is a Company that has acquired a reputation for rendering quality Onshore/Offshore supply and engineering services to the Oil and Gas industry in Nigeria and West Africa sub-region.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Control Analyst

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Main Functions


	Schedules and revises shipment plans to ensure efficient distribution of products to satisfy customers.
	Analyzes inventory levels, production speed and product demand to determine reorder levels which will ensure product availability and minimize inventory costs.
	Familiar with standard concepts, practices, and procedures within a particular field.
	Duties may include writing inventory reports, performing cycle counts, and determining periodic asset valuations.
	Works with moderate work direction and is skilled and knowledgeable to the position.
	Senior Inventory Control Analyst might be performing basic inventory decisions and analysis of high complexity.


Skills and Qualification


	MS Excel, ERP experience, organized.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@kimericgroup.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-04",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-05",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

  },

Inventory Control Analyst Job at Kimeric Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Kimeric Nigeria Limited is a Company that has acquired a reputation for rendering quality Onshore/Offshore supply and engineering services to the Oil and Gas industry in Nigeria and West Africa sub-region.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Control Analyst

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Main Functions
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Schedules and revises shipment plans to ensure efficient distribution of products to satisfy customers.
	Analyzes inventory levels, production speed and product demand to determine reorder levels which will ensure product availability and minimize inventory costs.
	Familiar with standard concepts, practices, and procedures within a particular field.
	Duties may include writing inventory reports, performing cycle counts, and determining periodic asset valuations.
	Works with moderate work direction and is skilled and knowledgeable to the position.
	Senior Inventory Control Analyst might be performing basic inventory decisions and analysis of high complexity.


Skills and Qualification


	MS Excel, ERP experience, organized.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Development Officer (Travel & Tour)",
  "description": "Phoenix Travel &amp; Tour is a premier travel and tour company dedicated to creating unforgettable experiences for our clients. We specialize in personalized travel planning, offering a wide range of services including guided tours, vacation packages, corporate travel management, and bespoke travel solutions.

With a passion for exploration and a commitment to excellence, we take care of every detail, from flights and accommodations to unique cultural experiences and local insights. Whether you&#39;re looking to relax on a tropical beach, explore historic landmarks, or embark on an adventure,Phoenix Travel&amp; Tour is your trusted partner in discovering the world.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Officer (Travel &amp; Tour)

Job Location: Garki, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Identify and pursue new business opportunities to grow the company&rsquo;s client base.
	Develop and maintain strong relationships with clients, partners, and stakeholders.
	Promote the company&rsquo;s travel and tour services through networking, presentations, and client engagement.
	Research and analyze market trends to develop effective sales and marketing strategies.
	Work closely with the marketing team to execute promotional campaigns.
	Meet and exceed set sales and revenue targets.
	Prepare proposals, presentations, and contracts for prospective clients.
	Provide excellent customer service and follow up on client inquiries.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: Hr@gracemonilimited.com using &ldquo;Business DevelopmentOfficer Travel Agent&rdquo; as the subject of the email.

Note: For more enquiries, send a message via +2347072555600 (Whatsapp only).",

Business Development Officer (Travel & Tour) Job at Phoenix Travel & Tour




        
    

        
        Phoenix Travel & Tour is a premier travel and tour company dedicated to creating unforgettable experiences for our clients. We specialize in personalized travel planning, offering a wide range of services including guided tours, vacation packages, corporate travel management, and bespoke travel solutions.

With a passion for exploration and a commitment to excellence, we take care of every detail, from flights and accommodations to unique cultural experiences and local insights. Whether you're looking to relax on a tropical beach, explore historic landmarks, or embark on an adventure,Phoenix Travel& Tour is your trusted partner in discovering the world.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Officer (Travel & Tour)

Job Location: Garki, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Identify and pursue new business opportunities to grow the company’s client base.
	Develop and maintain strong relationships with clients, partners, and stakeholders.
	Promote the company’s travel and tour services through networking, presentations, and client engagement.
	Research and analyze market trends to develop effective sales and marketing strategies.
	Work closely with the marketing team to execute promotional campaigns.
	Meet and exceed set sales and revenue targets.
	Prepare proposals, presentations, and contracts for prospective clients.
	Provide excellent customer service and follow up on client inquiries.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Business DevelopmentOfficer Travel Agent” as the subject of the email.

Note: For more enquiries, send a message via +2347072555600 (Whatsapp only).    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales & Marketing Executive",
  "description": "CrowningPoint Hospitality Solutions Limited is a premier hospitality consulting and management company dedicated to delivering innovative, tailored solutions for the hospitality and service industry. With a deep understanding of market dynamics and global best practices, we empower hotels, resorts, restaurants, and related businesses to achieve operational excellence, enhance guest experiences, and maximize profitability.

At CrowningPoint, we specialize in strategic advisory, operational management, staff training and recruitment, brand positioning, and pre-opening support. Our team of seasoned industry experts brings a wealth of experience and a passion for excellence, ensuring that each client receives customized, data-driven strategies designed to meet their unique needs and goals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales &amp; Marketing Executive
Job Location: Uyo, Akwa Ibom
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Identify and prospect new clients including hotels, restaurants, bars, resorts, event centers, and hospitality investors.
	Generate leads through cold calling, networking, referrals, social media, and field visits.
	Schedule meetings and presentations with prospective clients.
	Develop and maintain a robust sales pipeline.
	Follow up on inquiries and convert prospects into clients.


Sales Activities:


	Promote the company&#39;s consulting services, including:
	
		Hotel Management Services
		Restaurant Management Services
		Hospitality Staff Recruitment
		Hotel Marketing Services
		Staff Training and Development
		Hotel Setup and Pre-opening Services
		Business Development Consulting
		Operational Audits and Assessments
	
	
	Prepare and submit professional proposals and quotations.
	Negotiate contracts and service agreements within approved limits.
	Meet and exceed monthly and annual sales targets.
	Maintain accurate sales records and reports.


Marketing Functions:


	Develop and implement marketing campaigns to increase brand awareness.
	Manage the company&#39;s social media platforms.
	Create engaging content for Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, and other digital platforms.
	Assist in organizing promotional events, exhibitions, and networking programs.
	Conduct market research and competitor analysis.
	Identify emerging hospitality industry trends and opportunities.


Client Relationship Management:


	Build and maintain strong relationships with existing clients.
	Ensure excellent customer service throughout the client journey.
	Conduct regular client follow-ups and satisfaction checks.
	Address client concerns and coordinate solutions with relevant departments.
	Encourage repeat business and referrals.


Reporting and Documentation:


	Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly sales reports.
	Maintain an updated client database and CRM records.
	Track marketing campaign performance and prepare analytical reports.
	Submit activity reports and market intelligence findings to management.


Brand Representation:


	Represent the company professionally at meetings, conferences, trade fairs, and networking events.
	Promote the company&#39;s image and reputation in the hospitality industry.
	Ensure all marketing materials align with the company&#39;s brand guidelines.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a B.Sc Degree with 2 years of work experience.&nbsp;


Salary
N100,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and application to: recruitment@crowningpointhospitality.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Sales & Marketing Executive Job at CrowningPoint Hospitality Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        CrowningPoint Hospitality Solutions Limited is a premier hospitality consulting and management company dedicated to delivering innovative, tailored solutions for the hospitality and service industry. With a deep understanding of market dynamics and global best practices, we empower hotels, resorts, restaurants, and related businesses to achieve operational excellence, enhance guest experiences, and maximize profitability.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



At CrowningPoint, we specialize in strategic advisory, operational management, staff training and recruitment, brand positioning, and pre-opening support. Our team of seasoned industry experts brings a wealth of experience and a passion for excellence, ensuring that each client receives customized, data-driven strategies designed to meet their unique needs and goals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales & Marketing Executive
Job Location: Uyo, Akwa Ibom
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Identify and prospect new clients including hotels, restaurants, bars, resorts, event centers, and hospitality investors.
	Generate leads through cold calling, networking, referrals, social media, and field visits.
	Schedule meetings and presentations with prospective clients.
	Develop and maintain a robust sales pipeline.
	Follow up on inquiries and convert prospects into clients.


Sales Activities:


	Promote the company's consulting services, including:
	
		Hotel Management Services
		Restaurant Management Services
		Hospitality Staff Recruitment
		Hotel Marketing Services
		Staff Training and Development
		Hotel Setup and Pre-opening Services
		Business Development Consulting
		Operational Audits and Assessments
	
	
	Prepare and submit professional proposals and quotations.
	Negotiate contracts and service agreements within approved limits.
	Meet and exceed monthly and annual sales targets.
	Maintain accurate sales records and reports.


Marketing Functions:


	Develop and implement marketing campaigns to increase brand awareness.
	Manage the company's social media platforms.
	Create engaging content for Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, and other digital platforms.
	Assist in organizing promotional events, exhibitions, and networking programs.
	Conduct market research and competitor analysis.
	Identify emerging hospitality industry trends and opportunities.


Client Relationship Management:


	Build and maintain strong relationships with existing clients.
	Ensure excellent customer service throughout the client journey.
	Conduct regular client follow-ups and satisfaction checks.
	Address client concerns and coordinate solutions with relevant departments.
	Encourage repeat business and referrals.


Reporting and Documentation:


	Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly sales reports.
	Maintain an updated client database and CRM records.
	Track marketing campaign performance and prepare analytical reports.
	Submit activity reports and market intelligence findings to management.


Brand Representation:


	Represent the company professionally at meetings, conferences, trade fairs, and networking events.
	Promote the company's image and reputation in the hospitality industry.
	Ensure all marketing materials align with the company's brand guidelines.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a B.Sc Degree with 2 years of work experience. 


Salary
N100,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and application to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Financial Business Analyst",
  "description": "Paga is a licensed financial services company and a leading payments company in Nigeria with a massive transformative purpose - to make it simple for one billion people to access and use money. It was founded on the simple belief that the ubiquity of mobile phones can be leveraged in building an ecosystem that enables people to digitally send and receive money and creating simple financial access for everyone.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Financial Business Analyst

Job Location: Yaba, Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Analyst with track record of insightful and prescriptive analysis of business operation and performance.
	Ability to interact with Big Data and innovative and dynamic approach to analysis.


Key Responsibilities


	Analysis of business unit performance identifying deep lying drivers (primary and secondary)
	Collaborate with business unit data analyst to evaluate impact of initiatives on performance
	Prepare Cash based and non-Cash based P&amp;L to determine profitability by Unit and by Country
	Deliver actionable insights and analytical support to address complex financial questions and challenges from business teams.
	Generate precise ad-hoc financial reports as requested by the FP &amp; A Manager to support various initiatives.
	Keep track of outlier events and assess impact of business results
	Maintain monthly unit economics report by product and business line


Knowledge and Skill Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Finance, Economics, Accounting, or a related field. A masters degree or relevant certification (e.g. FMVA) is a plus.
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in a related role.
	Advanced computer software skills, including Excel, PowerPoint, and other accounting packages.
	Must have completed the mandatory NYSC.


Key Competencies:


	Technical Skills: Proficiency in financial modeling and Excel. Knowledge of macros would be an added advantage.
	Analytical Skills: Strong quantitative and analytical abilities to interpret financial data and trends.
	Communication: Excellent interpersonal and communication skills to work effectively with internal teams and external partners.
	Attention to Detail: High level of accuracy and attention to detail in managing treasury functions and reporting.
	Problem-Solving: Ability to assess complex financial situations and develop strategic solutions.
	Leadership: Strong leadership skills with the ability to mentor and manage a small treasury team.

Financial Business Analyst Job at Pagatech Limited




        
    

        
        Paga is a licensed financial services company and a leading payments company in Nigeria with a massive transformative purpose - to make it simple for one billion people to access and use money. It was founded on the simple belief that the ubiquity of mobile phones can be leveraged in building an ecosystem that enables people to digitally send and receive money and creating simple financial access for everyone.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Financial Business Analyst

Job Location: Yaba, Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Analyst with track record of insightful and prescriptive analysis of business operation and performance.
	Ability to interact with Big Data and innovative and dynamic approach to analysis.


Key Responsibilities


	Analysis of business unit performance identifying deep lying drivers (primary and secondary)
	Collaborate with business unit data analyst to evaluate impact of initiatives on performance
	Prepare Cash based and non-Cash based P&L to determine profitability by Unit and by Country
	Deliver actionable insights and analytical support to address complex financial questions and challenges from business teams.
	Generate precise ad-hoc financial reports as requested by the FP & A Manager to support various initiatives.
	Keep track of outlier events and assess impact of business results
	Maintain monthly unit economics report by product and business line


Knowledge and Skill Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Economics, Accounting, or a related field. A masters degree or relevant certification (e.g. FMVA) is a plus.
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in a related role.
	Advanced computer software skills, including Excel, PowerPoint, and other accounting packages.
	Must have completed the mandatory NYSC.


Key Competencies:


	Technical Skills: Proficiency in financial modeling and Excel. Knowledge of macros would be an added advantage.
	Analytical Skills: Strong quantitative and analytical abilities to interpret financial data and trends.
	Communication: Excellent interpersonal and communication skills to work effectively with internal teams and external partners.
	Attention to Detail: High level of accuracy and attention to detail in managing treasury functions and reporting.
	Problem-Solving: Ability to assess complex financial situations and develop strategic solutions.
	Leadership: Strong leadership skills with the ability to mentor and manage a small treasury team.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HSE Officer",
  "description": "Redikla Resources Company is a professional recruitment and human resource outsourcing firm committed to connecting qualified talent with reputable organizations. We specialize in end-to-end recruitment, workforce placement, and HR support services, ensuring that clients receive reliable, competent, and well-screened personnel while helping job seekers secure suitable employment opportunities.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HSE Officer&nbsp;

Job Location: Sango Ota, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Develop and enforce health, safety, and environmental policies and procedures in the factory
	Conduct regular workplace inspections and risk assessments to identify hazards
	Ensure compliance with local safety regulations and industry standards
	Organize safety training, toolbox talks, and awareness programs for staff
	Investigate workplace accidents, incidents, and near-misses and prepare detailed reports
	Recommend corrective and preventive actions to avoid recurrence of incidents
	Monitor use of Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) and ensure compliance
	Maintain HSE records, documentation, and reports for audits and inspections
	Coordinate emergency response procedures, including fire drills and evacuation plans
	Liaise with regulatory agencies and external auditors when required
	Promote a strong safety culture across all departments in the factory


Requirements / Qualifications


	BSc / HND in Environmental Science, Safety Management, Engineering, or related field
	2&ndash;5 years of experience in HSE role, preferably in a manufacturing environment
	Professional certification (e.g., NEBOSH, IOSH) is an added advantage
	Strong knowledge of occupational health and safety regulations
	Good communication, reporting, and training skills
	Ability to conduct risk assessments and incident investigations
	Attention to detail and strong problem-solving skills


Key Competencies:


	Safety awareness and leadership
	Risk management
	Incident investigation
	Compliance management
	Training and communication
	Emergency preparednes.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: rediklaresources@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-04",
  "validThrough": "2026-08-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Redikla Resources Company"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {

HSE Officer Job at Redikla Resources Company




        
    

        
        Redikla Resources Company is a professional recruitment and human resource outsourcing firm committed to connecting qualified talent with reputable organizations. We specialize in end-to-end recruitment, workforce placement, and HR support services, ensuring that clients receive reliable, competent, and well-screened personnel while helping job seekers secure suitable employment opportunities.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HSE Officer 

Job Location: Sango Ota, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Develop and enforce health, safety, and environmental policies and procedures in the factory
	Conduct regular workplace inspections and risk assessments to identify hazards
	Ensure compliance with local safety regulations and industry standards
	Organize safety training, toolbox talks, and awareness programs for staff
	Investigate workplace accidents, incidents, and near-misses and prepare detailed reports
	Recommend corrective and preventive actions to avoid recurrence of incidents
	Monitor use of Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) and ensure compliance
	Maintain HSE records, documentation, and reports for audits and inspections
	Coordinate emergency response procedures, including fire drills and evacuation plans
	Liaise with regulatory agencies and external auditors when required
	Promote a strong safety culture across all departments in the factory


Requirements / Qualifications


	BSc / HND in Environmental Science, Safety Management, Engineering, or related field
	2–5 years of experience in HSE role, preferably in a manufacturing environment
	Professional certification (e.g., NEBOSH, IOSH) is an added advantage
	Strong knowledge of occupational health and safety regulations
	Good communication, reporting, and training skills
	Ability to conduct risk assessments and incident investigations
	Attention to detail and strong problem-solving skills


Key Competencies:


	Safety awareness and leadership
	Risk management
	Incident investigation
	Compliance management
	Training and communication
	Emergency preparednes.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
